assertions: Initial /agents rendered Featured agents with AutoByteus Super Assistant once and regular All agents with Memory Compactor and Browser Fixture Agent.
Agent search for Super hid Featured agents grouping and returned AutoByteus Super Assistant once as a normal search result.
Run on featured AutoByteus Super Assistant navigated to /workspace and displayed Agent Definition = AutoByteus Super Assistant.
Settings > Server Settings > Basics rendered Featured catalog items card; Add agent + Add team + Save persisted browser-fixture-agent and browser-fixture-team in AUTOBYTEUS_FEATURED_CATALOG_ITEMS.
After Settings save, /agents showed AutoByteus Super Assistant and Browser Fixture Agent in Featured agents once each, while Memory Compactor remained in All agents.
After Settings save, /agent-teams showed Browser Fixture Team in Featured teams once.
Team search for Browser hid Featured teams grouping and returned Browser Fixture Team once as a normal search result.
A setting containing missing-agent and missing-team did not render unresolved ids in /agents catalog output.
Settings card displayed unresolved missing-agent and missing-team rows, allowed removing them, and saved a cleaned setting without unresolved ids.
Run on featured Browser Fixture Team navigated to /workspace and displayed Team Definition = Browser Fixture Team.
